title: sideritis arenaria var. peduncularis
intro: Sideritis arenaria var. peduncularis, also known as Greek mountain tea, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Sideritis, which is a group of plants commonly referred to as "ironworts". This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly in the Mediterranean region, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sideritis arenaria var. peduncularis include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Sideritis arenaria var. peduncularis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
